name: sidebar-accordion
description: Collapsible categorised left-rail navigation. Sections labelled with small monospace caps; items as horizontally-padded links with an active state (2 px left border in brand accent + soft accent-tint background).
html:
{{sectionLabel}}

  • {{label}}
aria: Wrap in <nav aria-label> to identify the navigation landmark. aria-current=page marks the active link. Do not nest <nav> elements inside each other.
open_questions: Adopt ps- class naming mirroring existing substrate conventions (ps-sidebar__link etc.) — resolved YES at sweep (consistent with ps-btn, ps-tabs, ps-crumbs).
